name: Rural Funds Group
analysis: RFF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.0700. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.0800, stop A$1.9800, target A$2.3800 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
